home.heroSubtitle: We are looking for dedicated, responsible candidates to grow with us in the household plastic products manufacturing industry at An Phuoc Industrial Park, Dong Nai.

company.title: About the Company
company.industryDetail: Manufacturing and processing of zip bags and household plastic products: floor mats, table placemats, cutting boards, drawer liners, food storage zip bags, and more.
company.heritageDetail: Established in 1983, Jhonsin Taiwan has built capabilities across material research, product design and manufacturing. Jhonsin Vietnam carries this commitment to innovation and quality into its operations in Vietnam.
company.why1: Safe working environment, compliant with ISO, IWAY, C-TPAT
company.why2: Full social insurance and benefits as required by law
company.why4: Convenient location at An Phuoc Industrial Park, Dong Nai

products.title: Houseware Products
products.intro: Practical houseware ranges, from food storage to organizing everyday living spaces.

capabilities.title: Manufacturing Capabilities
capabilities.intro: From material research to finished products, Jhonsin develops integrated capabilities for quality and efficiency.
capabilities.materialsText: Developing and applying materials suited to each product purpose.
capabilities.designText: Connecting product design, structure and practical user needs.
capabilities.manufacturingText: Continuously improving processes and equipment to maintain consistent quality.
capabilities.qualityText: Working toward satisfied customers, engaged colleagues and sustainable business operations.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: Connect with Jhonsin Vietnam to learn more about partnership and career opportunities.
